summary: Iteration 130 - Production retest after OpenAI key reset. GOOD NEWS: Soundboard AI is NOW WORKING - OpenAI key successfully configured in production. BAD NEWS: War Room still broken with product_or_service validation error - production deployment NOT updated with fix. Calibration deep scan failing with NoneType error.

critical.issue: Returns 400 with {"error":"product_or_service is required"}. The fix (Optional[str] = None) exists in preview code (/app/backend/routes/boardroom.py line 31) but production deployment still using old code that passes to Edge Function without default value
critical.fix_location: Production deployment needs to be updated - code fix already exists

critical.issue: Returns 500: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'observe' - AI tracing/LangSmith code not handling null tracer gracefully during website deep scan

minor.issue: Console shows ERR_ABORTED for warm-cognitive-engine and several API endpoints - likely race conditions during page navigation

integration_issues.issue: War Room input works but backend returns validation error. Error message displayed to user: {"error":"product_or_service is required"}
integration_issues.screenshot: Screenshot 1 shows error displayed in chat

login.details: Supabase auth working correctly, redirects to /advisor after login

soundboard_ai.details: OpenAI key NOW WORKING! Soundboard responds with business-specific AI insights. Shows 'I'm your Strategic Intelligence Advisor' welcome message and responds to queries.

advisor_dashboard.details: Shows Data Confidence: High (5/6 signals), Business Stability: 50 (Drifting), 3 Risks Requiring Attention with specific deal names and amounts

board_room.details: Board Room diagnosis endpoint works but navigates to main advisor page

action_items: CRITICAL: Deploy updated backend code to production - War Room fix (product_or_service: Optional[str] = None) exists in preview but NOT in production
HIGH: Fix calibration /api/enrichment/website NoneType error - add null check for LangSmith tracer before calling .observe()
LOW: Investigate warm-cognitive-engine Edge Function ERR_ABORTED errors
critical_code_review_comments: War Room fix exists at /app/backend/routes/boardroom.py line 31: product_or_service: Optional[str] = None - but production is NOT using this version
The Supabase Edge Function strategic-console-ai still validates product_or_service as required - backend should default it before calling Edge Function (lines 483-499 do this but code not deployed)
Calibration enrichment AI service error suggests LangSmith tracer initialization failing when keys are misconfigured

success_rate.frontend: 80% (Login, Advisor, Soundboard working; War Room broken)

context_for_next_testing_agent: OpenAI key is NOW WORKING - Soundboard AI responds successfully. War Room failure is a DEPLOYMENT issue not a code issue - the fix exists in preview code but production has not been redeployed. The Edge Function strategic-console-ai validates product_or_service, and the backend code that defaults it (lines 483-499) is not in production yet.

war_room_validation_error.root_cause: DEPLOYMENT GAP - The fix (product_or_service: Optional[str] = None at line 31) exists in /app/backend/routes/boardroom.py preview code, but production deployment is running OLD code that doesn't set default before calling Edge Function
evidence: Preview code line 31: product_or_service: Optional[str] = None
Preview code lines 483-499: defaults to 'General business advisory' and fetches from business_profiles
Production returns 400: {"error":"product_or_service is required"} meaning Edge Function validates it as required
This proves production backend is NOT passing product_or_service with default value
war_room_validation_error.mitigation: Redeploy backend to production with latest code

calibration_deep_scan_error.root_cause: NoneType error on .observe() call - LangSmith/AI tracer not initialized when AI keys are misconfigured or tracer disabled
evidence: This occurs in the AI response generation path during website enrichment scan
calibration_deep_scan_error.mitigation: Add null check: if tracer: tracer.observe(...) or use try/except around observe calls

comparison_to_iteration_129.soundboard: IMPROVED: Was 500 'AI provider keys not configured' → Now WORKING with AI responses
comparison_to_iteration_129.war_room: SAME: Still returns validation error - fix not deployed to production
